tackle.name: Tackle
tackle.description: A physical attack where the user charges at the target.

scratch.name: Scratch
scratch.description: Scratches the target with sharp claws.

growl.name: Growl
growl.description: Growls at the target to lower its Attack stat.

tail_whip.name: Tail Whip
tail_whip.description: Wags tail to lower the target's Defense.

ember.name: Ember
ember.description: A small flame attack that may cause a burn.

smokescreen.name: Smokescreen
smokescreen.description: Lowers the target's accuracy with smoke.

slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Slashes with claws. High critical-hit ratio.

water_gun.name: Water Gun
water_gun.description: Shoots a jet of water at the target.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Bites with sharp fangs. May cause flinching.

aqua_jet.name: Aqua Jet
aqua_jet.description: A quick water charge that always goes first.

surf.name: Surf
surf.description: A large wave crashes down on the target.

vine_whip.name: Vine Whip
vine_whip.description: Strikes the target with slender vines.

leech_seed.name: Leech Seed
leech_seed.description: Plants a seed that drains HP each turn.

razor_leaf.name: Razor Leaf
razor_leaf.description: Launches sharp leaves. High critical-hit ratio.

solar_beam.name: Solar Beam
solar_beam.description: Absorbs light, then fires a powerful beam.

spark.name: Spark
spark.description: A charged tackle that may paralyze.

quick_attack.name: Quick Attack
quick_attack.description: A lightning-fast attack that always goes first.

gust.name: Gust
gust.description: Whips up a gust of wind to strike the target.

harden.name: Harden
harden.description: Stiffens the body to raise Defense.

rock_throw.name: Rock Throw
rock_throw.description: Hurls a rock at the target.

string_shot.name: String Shot
string_shot.description: Lowers the target's Speed with sticky string.

bug_bite.name: Bug Bite
bug_bite.description: Bites the target with sharp mandibles.
